message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "ShipCaptain" as captain
participant ":System" as system

activate system

captain -> system : 1 ask the system to see how much the vessel sink
system -> captain : 2 ask the ship's captain to the ship data to indentify and the voyage id to know the total of containers
captain -> system : 3 introduces the data asked
activate system
system -> system : 4 get the ship and the voyage and make all calculation
system -> captain : 5 shows the results and informs the success of the operation

deactivate system
@enduml
